visual_weight_analysis: The primary focal drivers are the multitude of spectators creating a sea of people throughout the image. The lighting contrast and natural light entering from the upper level of the stadium add depth and visual interest, requiring careful framing to balance emotional storytelling.
justification: The final crop was selected to nudge slightly towards the left (48%) and up (50%) from the raw centroid to anchor the mathematical luminance centroid while emphasizing the faces and human figures at the forefront, fulfilling asymmetrical visual balance and emotional storytelling.
